
Cassie shouted, 

 winding up her fist and socking him right in the kisser!

Daddy sobbed, 

, while he rocked back and forth in the foetal position. He felt ashamed as he sobbed, 



, eventually he ended up a shrivelled into a raisin, due to all the moisture from his body being cried out of his tear ducts.

Cassie replied resolutely,  💪🏽😘💪🏽

Then, she gave a list of reasons — and non-sensical price estimates, or discounts — for the season:
1. Jesus (£0.99 or £1)
2. Ham Sandwich (£100)
3. Couch Gun (£99.99)
4. Christos'/Christos’ büger-månchë (USD$9,999.99); and
5. Houdini’s mother-in-law’s sister's niece's husband,  (30°C for 30% off).

Daddy thought to himself for a moment, then posited the question, , this he asked her while jabbing her in her ribs with his elbow, first gently, and a little harder each time, until he felt his elbow crack, , he screamed while writhing in agony on the floor, until he broke down into a maniacal laughter. The same type of laughter, you can only ever hear when a father's pride for his one and only daughter has surpassed humanity's upper limits.

You've never heard it before; however, when you hear it, you know exactly what it is and why you are hearing it.

Daddy looked Cassie in her eyes and proudly affirmed,  💪🏽😘💪🏽

Then they galloped off into the sunrise, never daring to blink, until their maculas roasted in their sockets, frying their retinas to a crisp and leaving their photoreceptors to permanently wither away like dried tears of joy.
